name: Turkish Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and sugar in an ibrik or small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Remove from heat and add coffee and cardamon.
4. Stir well.
5. Return to heat.
6. When coffee foams up, remove from heat and let grounds settle.
7. Repeat steps 5-6 two more times.
8. Pour into cups; let grounds settle before drinking.
